message:
fix: remove dead code and redundant pattern check

- status/compaction.go: Remove redundant second loop that checked
  generic patterns again (already covered by first loop condition)
- templates/parser.go: Remove dead conditional marker check in
  substituteVariables (regex cannot match {{#var}} or {{/var}} patterns)
